author: @ZombieDeer
text:
I want Nova thrown behind bars but lately it's gotten harder and harder to watch people who cover lolcows as they focus more on all the ways to insult the lolcow over the problem behavior. "Who needs motivation to take a shower." Is really out of touch. Don't bring down other people because he's a bad person. Call out his bs, not his weight or hair or showering. I mean pointing out it becoming a health problem to himself and others is fine, saying he SHOULD shower is fine,  but all this content lately from every creator is just lumping everyday people into it and it makes them feel ashamed of what they can't do. Stop normalizing bullying. Does Nova deserve it? Absolutely, but the people who have the same issues as him don't deserve it. (Issues as in weight and stuff, I do not believe for a second that Nova has genuine issues/excuses aside from being a bad person.)

You can call his hair greasy all you want but there's no need to word it in a way where not being able to take a shower is grounds for someone being a bad person, or shameful. This is no excuse for people who are just being lazy but we can be understanding that there can be reasons people are overweight/underweight/not showering/etc.

author: @JohnMelland
text: Doing CNA work, we washed after every 3 people and hand sanitizer before each tray is passed. Wash before you feed someone or assist them. Wash again between people. Hospitals and clinics the sinks are dry 99% of the time. A lot of people get something else in the hospital from viruses and bacteria, to deadly diseases or the previous mentioned bugs. Some people die in the hospital. Next time you go to your regular doctor or the emergency room and notice the sinks. Notice if they wash their hands, not just use hand sanitizer. I know some places I've worked killed people by not having sterile gloves and replacing bandages on severe and infection prone wounds. Despite sterile dressings, the gloves are not. Infection spreads quick and sometimes not responsive to antibiotics. Like a domino effect, it starts shutting down and disrupting proper body functions, which leads to people expiring. Thank you.

author: @GIA_Music_Official
text: as someone with severe childhood trauma (2 decades of daily s*xual, emotional, and physical abuse)and has experienced involuntary age regression, i can assure you anyone who experiences it absolutely hates and dreads regression. It is a loss of agency and grounding, while also experiencing the most raw and unfiltered emotional response as if your trauma is happining all over again. just fucking awful. Age regression can develop as a "maladaptive coping mechanism" in children when they experience trauma without learning proper coping mechanisms. just like disassociation, or the "fawn" response, these coping mechanisms can temporarily alleviate a negative emotional response, but are almost never healthy for the individual's psyche. age regression is an awful feeling that i dont wish upon anyone. so Nova "voluntarily age regressing" is just an excuse for his predatory actions. fucking disgusting when these monsters try to coopt actual mental health issues into their fucked up lives.

author: @that_one_kid7317
text:
The Trevor Project hotline works with queer kids, specifically, as they often have problems 988 wouldn't understand. I, personally, have used both in previous events. I texted 988 and the person on the end took up to 10 minutes to reply, I felt further ignored and it could have cost me my life. TTP took 2 minutes MAX, helped me break down my problem and find a way to conquer it. 

It is SPECIFICALLY for queer people who struggle with their identity and face the worst of the worst people and don't have anyone they feel understands them. Please don't make fun of a fucking suicide hotline dude, that's kinda fucked, especially as the government has cut funding for it and is actively trying to take it down.

author: @mamoonie
text: Unfortunately lack of motivation to shower and other self care activities is real and is something I’ve struggled with. It sounds crazy and honestly before i became chronically ill i couldn’t understand it either, i’m not justifying this disgusting creature’s behaviour but i hope others will understand that this can unfortunately be a real struggle.. especially for people on the spectrum like myself! You can want to do something sosososoos much! And yet you can’t bring yourself to do it as if theres a chain and ball attached to your legs. I don’t expect everyone to understand because i know it sounds like a ridiculous concept and it sounds like something you should be able to just do but i promise it’s not that easy unfortunately.. AGAIN i do NOT at ALL support this freak but making fun of people for not being able to take care of themselves isn’t cool

author: @xyrves
text: just would like to say this since the shower stuff kind of feels insensitive to people on depression. for eg i would shower 1-2 a day and then it came a point in my life where depression made everything a hell of a mountain climb. i still showered obv but not regularly. could be 3 days, a week, it wasnt nice. i was pre clean however. and this is coming from someone who is like a germaphobe.. depression can take away and change people. nova seems to just be lazy and its a different kind of motivation. but hopefully this helps yall, stay clean and remember the Lord is there for u! cast your sorrows to him. depression is tough but the Lord is tougher! Dont let depression take away even the basics of life such as hygiene.

author: @YIPPIESHARK66
text:
As somebody who has been exploited for being autistic online and in real life with nobody helping me, supporting me (not even the police) at a young age and depressed, sometimes it is REALLY hard to do some basic things which I understand but, he acts just like them all: guilt tripping with suicidal tendencies on the side, I have been through hell and back since I was 4 (with unrelated and related things) and you will never catch me preying on younger people or using my mental health, disability or trauma to exploit others or gain sympathy, having emotions is valid like I have been so traumatised I could barely move my arm without agonising pain because of constant panic attacks and starving myself to cope but it is no excuse, THERES a difference between being mentally unwell and being a shitty person infact personally, im notoriously known for being kind-hearted and Shakespeare reborn when it comes to comforting others, my nickname is based off of a character made for emotional support dude, i cry over the cinema ads because it’s made by man 🥀🥀🥀🥀

Also another thing, a lot of my hyperfixations have been family friendly shows due to nostalgia, long lasting special interests or i just like it so saying THATS age regressing makes me feel ashamed (Bluey, my little pony, Robin Hood, other pieces of media like Steven universe or really good old movies) this is apart of some people being mentally unwell, sexually abused ect so I show no shame to victims who use this to cope and hope they have access to support but if you are going to impressionable children and this is just a fetish, that is VILE.

I hate when people like this use the fact they’re alone to exploit kids because I was entirely isolated as a child that at six i didn’t think life was real and this was a hallucination by god where he tests his angels which spiralled into me thinking I was made by god for other peoples pleasure or I’m only alive to feel pain, prejudice is a pain in the ass because its what led to me to people like this, for the heavens i even saw a dead body at 13 with no real support and I still came out my house practically sane, sure sometimes I have weird factors but its stimming, info-dumping, my personality switching and dissociating, not being a disgusting pig 

I love your work man, one of my special interests is psychology and this really makes me think more there is hope in the world 
(And if you do read this i hope your day has been great and if you are flabbergasted at my message i am completely safe now, healing and going as strong as I can be <33)
